name: linear-sdlc
description: Linear-driven SDLC workflow for Claude Code: ticket-driven development with brainstorming, ticket creation, implementation, specialist reviews, debugging, checkpoints, and health monitoring — all powered by the Linear MCP server.

linear_api_key.title: Linear API key
linear_api_key.description: Your Linear API key (get it at linear.app/settings/api). Stored in your OS keychain.

linear_team_id.title: Linear team ID
linear_team_id.description: Your Linear team identifier (e.g., 'VER'). Optional — you'll be prompted on first use if not set.
